Ballistic VIP Protection Products

Superlight (density, 0.97 g/cc) high molecular weight polyethylene fiber reinforced composites are used to develop composite ballistic protection panels for the first time in Turkey.  Standard ballistic shooting tests were performed on these superlight panels and revealed no penetration in the panel.  Only a slight bump occured on the surface.  Using this light PE panels, variety of ballistic products including computer bag, hand bag and back packs are developed along with VIP emergency ballistic cover.

Figure 5. SUPERLIGHT (DENSITY 0.97 G/CC) PE FIBER REINFORCED BALLISTIC PRODUCTS: Ballistic protection cover, ballistic protection back pack, ballistic panel for the poliçe forces
